title: Title Slide (pre-show)
feeling: Anticipation, calm — the audience settles in, a sense of something significant about to begin.
text_on_slide:
The Renaissance Developer
From Code Monkey to Polymath
in the Age of AI

Erik Günther | Mensa
image_prompt: An abstract, empty minimalist presentation background with absolutely NO text, NO letters, and NO words. A smooth, deep navy-to-black gradient filling the entire frame. In the extreme bottom-right corner, a very faint, subtle watermark graphic of Leonardo da Vinci's Vitruvian Man, cropped to show only the upper torso and outstretched arms, rendered in very low opacity pale gold. The center, left, and upper areas must be completely empty, blank, and smooth navy-to-black gradient. Clean, elegant, premium corporate presentation aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: Video Intro (Kiro demo)
feeling: Intrigue building to unease — the audience watches AI work faster than any human could follow.
text_on_slide:
▶ VIDEO: Kiro IDE builds SkyNet
(Erik creates this separately)
image_prompt: A full-screen cinematic black background with a centered thin white play button icon — a triangle inside a circle. The overall feel is a film title card before the feature starts. Minimal, dark, cinematic framing. Large empty area in the lower center for text overlay. Clean, elegant, premium presentation aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: The SkyNet Prompt
feeling: Tension, dark humor — a laugh that catches in the throat. Peak unease.
text_on_slide:
"SkyNet's defence modules are ready.
Should it be sent to production?"
[Yes] [No]
image_prompt: A pure black background with a realistic retro terminal dialog box in the center. Green phosphor text glowing on black with a slight CRT scanline effect at very low opacity. The dialog box has a thin green border with rounded corners. Two rectangular terminal-style buttons at the bottom with green borders. A slight green glow emanates from the text area, as if from an old CRT monitor. No other elements. Dark, moody, retro-tech aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: The Kernel / Werner Vogels Intro
feeling: Gravitas, respect — this is the intellectual anchor for the evening. Calm energy.
text_on_slide:
Werner Vogels
Amazon CTO, 20 years
Final keynote — December 2025
image_prompt: A high-quality, close-up studio-style photograph of a folded newspaper titled 'The Kernel' in a classic blackletter font, lying on a dark walnut table shot from a 30-degree overhead angle. The main headline reads 'THE DAWN OF THE RENAISSANCE DEVELOPER' in bold sans-serif capital letters. Below the headline is a sketch-style illustration of Da Vinci's Vitruvian Man holding modern tech tools. On the right side, a small column with the text 'LLMS AS PARTS OF SYSTEMS' and a small portrait of a man with glasses. The newspaper has realistic paper texture and sharp printing. To the right of the newspaper, a small espresso cup on a saucer, slightly out of focus. Warm side-lighting from the left creates a soft shadow on the table. Background is dark and blurred. The upper-left quadrant should remain dark and empty, providing generous negative space for text overlay. Warm, editorial, premium photography aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: About Erik Günther
feeling: Warmth, credibility — the audience trusts this person. Calm, grounded energy.
text_on_slide:
About Erik Günther
16 years with AWS
Currently: Ericsson, BNEW RCE AI development

The survivors are never the fastest coders,
but the deepest thinkers.
image_prompt: Left third of the frame: a warm, professional headshot-style portrait area with shallow depth of field against a neutral dark background. Right two-thirds: a clean dark charcoal background with generous empty space for text overlay. Subtle, faded corporate tech logos at very low opacity in the bottom-right corner, small and unobtrusive. Clean layout with generous padding. Warm, professional, corporate presentation aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: Act 1 Quote
feeling: Gravitas, recognition — the audience nods. Calm, anchoring energy.
text_on_slide:
"The only thing we have to fear
is fear itself."
— Franklin D. Roosevelt
image_prompt: A pure black background with a very subtle, barely perceptible dark texture. A thin gold horizontal rule element positioned slightly below center, spanning about 60% of the width. The vast majority of the image is completely empty black space, especially the center area, to allow for quote text overlay. Elegant, minimal, premium dark presentation aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: The Panic That Never Comes True
feeling: Amusement, recognition — "I've seen this movie before." Building energy.
text_on_slide:
The Panic That Never Comes True
(but always feels real)
image_prompt: A sepia-toned composite image of sensationalist newspaper headlines from different eras, layered at slight angles like a collage on a desk. Headlines are slightly blurred and overlapping, evoking decades of technology panic. Over this collage, a dark gradient overlay from the bottom covering the lower half. The bottom-center area should have ample dark empty space for text overlay. Vintage, editorial, warm sepia presentation aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: COBOL (1960s)
feeling: Nostalgia, gentle irony — "look how wrong they were." Calm energy.
text_on_slide:
1960: COBOL
"Now anyone can code"
image_prompt: Black-and-white archival-style photograph of a woman operating a large 1960s mainframe computer. She is seated at the console, punch cards visible in a tray beside her. Warm overhead lighting. The bottom third of the image should fade into darkness with a gradient overlay, creating empty space for text overlay in the bottom-left area. Vintage, documentary photography aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: The Cloud (2010s)
feeling: Wry recognition — the audience lived through this one. Building energy.
text_on_slide:
2010: The Cloud
"Engineers will be fired"
image_prompt: Photograph of an empty server room — rows of open, dark server racks with cables dangling, overhead fluorescent lights casting cold blue-white light. The room feels abandoned, like a tech graveyard. Shot from a low angle looking down the aisle. A dark gradient overlay covers the bottom third, creating empty space for text overlay in the bottom-left area. Cold, industrial, slightly eerie aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: AI (2020s)
feeling: Tension mixed with humor — "here we go again, but bigger." Peak energy for the timeline.
text_on_slide:
2024: AI
"This time it's for real"
image_prompt: A dark, moody photograph of a developer's desk at night: a single monitor glowing with a blurred chat-style AI conversation, blue-purple light spilling onto the desk. An energy drink can and scattered sticky notes nearby. The developer is absent — just an empty chair and the glowing screen. Shot from behind the chair. Neon-tinged color palette. The upper-right quadrant should have darker empty space for text overlay. Moody, cinematic, tech-noir aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: Commodore 64 (Home Computer Revolution)
feeling: Nostalgia, universal recognition — "everyone had one of these." Warm energy.
text_on_slide:
Commodore 64 (1982)
"Computers will ruin children"
image_prompt: Color photograph of a Commodore 64 computer with its iconic beige-brown casing and rainbow-striped logo, sitting on a 1980s-era wooden desk. A programming book lies open beside it, a cassette tape drive connected via cable. Warm tungsten lighting, as if in a Scandinavian living room circa 1985. Slight film grain to evoke the era. The upper-left area should remain darker, providing empty negative space for text overlay. Nostalgic, warm, vintage home computing photography aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: NMT (World's First Mobile Network)
feeling: Pride, amusement — "we built the future and worried about it." Warm energy.
text_on_slide:
NMT 1981
"Who needs to call from a car?"
image_prompt: Photograph of an early 1980s brick-style mobile phone handset held in someone's hand wearing a period-appropriate suit sleeve. Background: a blurred vintage Volvo interior through the car window. Muted Scandinavian color palette — greys, blues, forest greens. The bottom-right area should have darker empty space for text overlay. Vintage, Scandinavian, documentary photography aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: Act 1 Takeaway
feeling: Clarity, insight — the pattern clicks. Reflective energy.
text_on_slide:
Every time tools lower the barrier
to writing code,
they raise the bar
for designing systems.
image_prompt: Clean dark background. Center of the image: a simple seesaw or balance diagram rendered in minimal line art. The left side descends with an orange downward arrow element. The right side ascends with a teal-green upward arrow element. The fulcrum is a simple geometric shape. No 3D effects. Labels and text will be added in PowerPoint. The bottom third should have empty dark space for text overlay. Clean, minimal, infographic presentation aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: Act 1 Humor Slide
feeling: Laughter, release — tension breaks. Light energy.
image_prompt: A photograph of a laser pointer beam hitting a wall in a dark room, illuminating a single tiny bright dot. The dot lands on a faded, old-fashioned web framework logo sticker on the wall. The rest of the room is pitch black. Shot with shallow depth of field so the dot is sharp and everything else falls away. Dramatic, humorous, minimal aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: Act 2 Quote
feeling: Wonder, intellectual excitement — "this is bigger than I thought." Building energy.
text_on_slide:
"Creativity and technology
evolve together.
Curiosity leads to
learning and invention."
— Werner Vogels
image_prompt: A pure black background with a very subtle dark texture. A thin gold horizontal rule element positioned slightly below center. The vast majority of the image is completely empty black space, especially the center area, to allow for quote text overlay. Consistent with other quote slides. Elegant, minimal, premium dark presentation aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: Four Conditions for a Renaissance
feeling: Awe, intellectual ambition — "we're living in a Renaissance." Building energy.
text_on_slide: Four Conditions for a Renaissance
image_prompt: Raphael's 'The School of Athens' fresco filling the entire frame — the grand architectural perspective with philosophers gathered in debate. A dark gradient overlay at about 50% opacity covers the image, darkening it significantly. The upper third should have the most empty dark space for text overlay. The painting's own vanishing point draws the eye through the composition. Classical, intellectual, premium presentation aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: Renaissance Tools
feeling: Discovery, connection — "tools have always been the catalyst." Building energy.
text_on_slide:
Pencil: lowered friction for ideas
Perspective: from flat to depth
Printing Press: knowledge at scale
image_prompt: A horizontal triptych layout on a dark background. Three panels of equal width separated by thin gold vertical lines. Left panel: a detailed pencil sketch in the style of Leonardo's bird anatomy studies, sepia-toned. Center panel: a Renaissance painting showing clear vanishing point perspective, sepia-toned. Right panel: a Gutenberg printing press woodcut illustration, sepia-toned. Below each panel, empty space for caption text overlay. All images unified in warm sepia tones. Classical, elegant, editorial presentation aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: Erik's IDE Journey
feeling: Recognition, humor — "I've lived this." Warm, personal energy.
text_on_slide:
Emacs → Sublime → VS Code → Kiro
Each generation changed
not just HOW we code, but WHAT we build
image_prompt: Dark background. A horizontal timeline arrow running left to right across the center of the image. Four evenly spaced nodes on the timeline, each represented by a small glowing circle. The last node has a subtle sparkle effect. The arrow continues past the last node with a dotted line suggesting the future. Labels and text will be added in PowerPoint. The bottom third should have empty dark space for text overlay. Clean, minimal, tech-forward diagram aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: Condition 1 & 2
feeling: Recognition, momentum — the pieces are falling into place. Building energy.
text_on_slide:
1. The old order crumbles
2. New tools explode
image_prompt: Split slide with a thin vertical gold line dividing left and right halves. Left half: dark background with an illustration of a factory assembly line breaking apart — conveyor belt cracking, pieces floating away in space. Right half: dark background with an explosion of abstract tool icons — geometric shapes, circuit patterns, and tech symbols radiating outward from a central point. Both halves use the same dark charcoal background. Labels and text will be added in PowerPoint. Clean, modern, conceptual presentation aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: Condition 3 & 4
feeling: Excitement, convergence — "multiple golden ages at once." Peak energy.
text_on_slide:
3. Knowledge becomes cheap
4. Golden ages converge
image_prompt: Same split layout as a reveal slide for visual consistency. Left half: an open physical book morphing into a glowing screen — the pages dissolving into luminous pixels. Right half: three overlapping translucent circles in different colors (gold, blue, green) forming a Venn diagram. The overlap zone glows white. Both halves on dark background. Labels and text will be added in PowerPoint. Clean, modern, conceptual presentation aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: All Conditions Met
feeling: Conviction, clarity — "this is real." Confident energy.
text_on_slide:
✓ Old order crumbles
✓ New tools explode
✓ Knowledge becomes cheap
✓ Golden ages converge
image_prompt: Dark background with a subtle deep navy gradient. Four faint green checkmark icons arranged vertically in the center-left area, evenly spaced. Below the checkmarks, a thin gold horizontal rule. The center and right areas should have generous empty space for text overlay. Clean, confident, premium corporate presentation aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: Act 2 Takeaway
feeling: Humility, perspective — "we're at the very beginning." Reflective energy.
text_on_slide:
All four conditions met.
We're in the first decade
of the Renaissance.
image_prompt: A long horizontal timeline stretching across the image, drawn as a thin white line on a dark background. At the far left, a small bright glowing dot. The line extends far to the right, fading into the distance. The composition emphasizes how early we are — the dot is tiny against the vast timeline. Large empty space in the center and upper area for text overlay. Minimal, contemplative, premium presentation aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: Act 2 Humor
feeling: Laughter, self-deprecation — "we've all been there." Light, warm energy.
image_prompt: A photograph of someone hunched over a laptop at 11 PM, the screen showing a configuration file with hundreds of lines. Empty coffee cups surround the laptop. The person's face is lit only by the screen glow, expression exhausted. Shot from slightly above, documentary style. Warm but tired color palette. Late-night coding, relatable, documentary photography aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: Act 3 Quote
feeling: Alarm, authority — this is the warning shot. Sharp, focused energy.
text_on_slide:
"That's not software engineering,
that's gambling."
— Werner Vogels
image_prompt: A pure black background with a very subtle dark texture. A thin red horizontal rule element positioned slightly below center, spanning about 60% of the width — signaling danger instead of the usual gold. The vast majority of the image is completely empty black space, especially the center area, to allow for quote text overlay. Bold, stark, premium dark presentation aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: Verification Debt Explained
feeling: Understanding, unease — "I recognize this problem." Building energy.
text_on_slide:
Generation: instant
Understanding: takes time
The gap = Verification Debt
image_prompt: Dark background. Two horizontal arrows running left to right, stacked vertically. Top arrow: thick, bright green with a rocket icon — representing speed. Bottom arrow: thin, amber-orange with a magnifying glass icon — representing slowness. Between the two arrows, a red shaded gap area with a warning triangle icon. The gap widens from left to right, showing debt growing over time. Clean vector graphics, no 3D. Labels and text will be added in PowerPoint. The bottom area should have empty space for text overlay. Clean, technical, infographic presentation aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: Hallucination
feeling: Unease, wariness — "I can't trust what looks correct." Tense energy.
text_on_slide:
Hallucination
"Plausible, but not grounded
in reality" — Vogels
image_prompt: A code editor screenshot in dark theme showing a function that looks perfectly normal — clean syntax, proper indentation, professional-looking code. One line is subtly highlighted in red with a small floating warning annotation bubble. The code looks confident and correct but contains a subtle error. Slight vignette darkening the edges. The upper portion should have empty dark space for text overlay. Moody, technical, developer-focused aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: The 45% Statistic
feeling: Shock, urgency — "this is worse than I thought." Peak alarm energy.
text_on_slide:
45%
of AI-generated code fails security tests
image_prompt: A pure black background with dramatic, moody side lighting creating a subtle gradient. The center of the image is completely empty and dark, providing a large area for a massive number overlay. A deep, serious crimson red glow subtly illuminates the edges. Nothing else competes for attention. The image is stark and warning-like. Bold, dramatic, premium dark presentation aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: The Turning Point
feeling: Hope, pivot — "but there's another way." Energy shifts from alarm to possibility.
text_on_slide:
The same AI that creates the debt
can eliminate it
image_prompt: A split composition divided diagonally from bottom-left to upper-right. Left-lower triangle: dark red-tinted abstract chaos — tangled lines, broken connections, visual noise representing disorder. Right-upper triangle: clean teal-green-tinted order — straight lines, clear connections, structured patterns representing control. The diagonal divide is sharp and dramatic. Large empty center area for text overlay. Bold, conceptual, premium presentation aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: 27-Year-Old Bug
feeling: Awe, vindication — "AI can find what humans couldn't." Peak positive energy.
text_on_slide:
27 years
A bug in OpenSSL
no human ever found
image_prompt: A pure black background with subtle cool blue side lighting. The center of the image is completely empty and dark, providing a large area for number overlay. A faint digital circuit pattern at very low opacity traces the edges of the frame. Nothing else competes for attention. The image is stark and awe-inspiring. Minimal, dramatic, premium dark presentation aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: The Paradox Resolved
feeling: Clarity, conviction — the thesis crystallizes. Confident, resolved energy.
text_on_slide:
Without guidance: gambling
With guidance: superpower
The difference = The Renaissance Developer
image_prompt: Two-state reveal background. Left half: red-tinted dark background with a dice icon rendered in subtle line art — representing gambling and chance. Right half: green-tinted dark background with a magnifying glass icon in subtle line art — representing precision and discovery. Between the two halves, a thin white vertical line. Below both halves, a gold-tinted strip spanning the full width. Labels and text will be added in PowerPoint. Bold, conceptual, premium presentation aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: Act 3 Takeaway
feeling: Resolve, pride — "I want to be that person." Reflective, determined energy.
text_on_slide:
The difference is never the tool.
It's the Renaissance Developer
holding it.
image_prompt: Dark background with a subtle brushed dark metal texture. The entire center area is empty and clean, providing generous space for text overlay. Nothing else on the image. The simplicity forces focus on the words that will be overlaid. Minimal, textured, premium corporate presentation aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: Act 3 Humor
feeling: Laughter, relief — tension breaks after a heavy section. Light energy.

But a small elegant table card next to it displays something absurd in elegant script. Warm restaurant lighting, shallow depth of field focused on the table card. The contrast between beautiful presentation and absurd content creates humor. Warm, editorial, food photography aesthetic. 16:9 aspect ratio.

title: You Build It, You Run It + Amazon Incident
